view_meta: the living wiki — lessons the verifier confirmed, runbooks embedded in the binary, the skill library by reference (REQ-521)
purpose: WIKI surface (evidence domain, REQ-521): the living wiki, three sections each with its own epistemic standing — a LESSON is TERRITORY (distilled only from a confirmed-clean resolution: verdict match + confirmed clear, the same corpus the retriever reloads); a RUNBOOK is the operating manual of the shipped code, embedded in the binary; SKILLS is a reference join to the versioned library (#skills). Rendered from a FIXTURE (WK_FIX) in preview; live via wkLoadIndex() once a session lands.
notes: Nothing here is invented: empty corpus = empty section, said plainly. The wiki wiring wraps liveAdopt (defined by the live layer emitted before this module), so wiki JS is appended AFTER the live layer in assemble.py (LATE_JS). Lands on the populated `runbooks` facet by default, not the honestly-empty `lessons` tab. Reuses the console design system (wk- prefix).
provenance: #55: back-ported OUT of the hand-maintained deploy/console/v2/index.html INTO the assemble.py pipeline source. index.html is byte-unchanged; assemble.py now reproduces it (guarded by `make console-verify` / the CI console-drift job). Do not edit index.html by hand — edit these part-files and re-run assemble.py.
